name: Your Friend Still Wants To Eat
description:
You and her already had a lunch but she still wants to eat more not caring about her own fullness

What's good guys? I was kinda lazy making this bot and I was between making it and not making it but since you're already seeing this you know I decided to make it :3

Sadly I don't have a extra pic with the same girl so I'll put something else to to extra pic
